value_metric: an evidence-backed orchestration decision: the free-tier path (Cron + in-worker idempotent processing + a D1 retry/DLQ ledger) already delivers exactly-once effect under at-least-once delivery, so Cloudflare Queues and Workflows -- both requiring the paid plan and forbidden by DIR-007 without Owner authorization -- are NOT adopted; the daily pipeline stays simple, free, and reliable

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: decision + simulation only; no production orchestration change; the D1 retry/DLQ ledger is designed, not yet wired

decision: KEEP Path A (free Cron + idempotent + D1 retry/DLQ). Do NOT adopt Queues/Workflows.
